query:
-- เปรียบเทียบ contracts.bad_debt_amount กับ SUM ของ payment rows ที่ debtDb.ts จะใช้
-- debtDb.ts ใช้ realPayments (numeric payment_external_id หรือ TXRT receipt) เท่านั้น
-- และ recalculate จาก created_at + updated_by (ระดับ 2)
-- ดูว่าสัญญาไหนที่ SUM ของ realPayments (ระดับ 2) ≠ contracts.bad_debt_amount

SELECT 
  c.contract_no,
  c.external_id,
  c.bad_debt_amount AS contracts_bad_debt,
  -- SUM ของ real payments ทั้งหมดที่มี created_at + updated_by เดียวกับ row ล่าสุด (ระดับ 2)
  (
    SELECT SUM(CAST(pt2.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))
    FROM payment_transactions pt2
    WHERE pt2.contract_external_id = c.external_id
      AND pt2.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND (pt2.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt2.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
      AND DATE(pt2.created_at) = (
        SELECT DATE(pt3.created_at) 
        FROM payment_transactions pt3
        WHERE pt3.contract_external_id = c.external_id
          AND pt3.section = 'Fastfone365'
          AND (pt3.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt3.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
        ORDER BY pt3.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
      )
      AND pt2.updated_by = (
        SELECT pt4.updated_by
        FROM payment_transactions pt4
        WHERE pt4.contract_external_id = c.external_id
          AND pt4.section = 'Fastfone365'
          AND (pt4.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt4.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
        ORDER BY pt4.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
      )
  ) AS debtdb_bad_debt
FROM contracts c
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
HAVING ABS(COALESCE(debtdb_bad_debt, 0) - COALESCE(contracts_bad_debt, 0)) > 1
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(debtdb_bad_debt, 0) - COALESCE(contracts_bad_debt, 0)) DESC
LIMIT 20;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute

  (
    SELECT SUM(CAST(pt2.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))

      AND DATE(pt2.created_at) = (
        SELECT DATE(pt3.created_at) 
        FROM payment_transactions pt3
        WHERE pt3.contract_external_id = c.external_id
          AND pt3.section = 'Fastfone365'
          AND (pt3.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt3.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
        ORDER BY pt3.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
      )
      AND pt2.updated_by = (
        SELECT pt4.updated_by
        FROM payment_transactions pt4
        WHERE pt4.contract_external_id = c.external_id
          AND pt4.section = 'Fastfone365'
          AND (pt4.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt4.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
        ORDER BY pt4.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

LIMIT 20;
